name: UniDL
short_description: Media streaming and sharing platform with Telegram integration.
description: UniDL is a media streaming and sharing platform with Telegram integration. It supports self-hosted deployment via Docker Compose and provides tools for downloading and organizing video/audio libraries. With local control over assets and distribution, it avoids third-party cloud limitations.
usecases: Self-host UniDL on your home server to media streaming and sharing platform with telegram integration without depending on third-party cloud services.
Use UniDL to manage your media workflows privately, keeping all data under your control on local infrastructure.
